rootCause: The clear-glass media reset applied opacity: 1 !important to every video beneath .work-card-media, overriding the carousel's inactive-slide opacity rule and compositing all video layers at once.

checks.siftInitialState: pass: one visible and playing slide; two hidden and paused slides; all three readyState 4
checks.siftManualNavigation: pass: telemetry dot activates slide 2, hides and pauses slides 1 and 3
checks.andurilInitialState: pass: one visible and playing slide; two hidden and paused slides; all three readyState 4
checks.andurilManualNavigation: pass: Fury dot activates slide 3, hides and pauses slides 1 and 2
checks.mobileCarouselState: pass: one visible and playing Sift or Anduril slide at 390 by 844; inactive slides hidden and paused
checks.mobileManualNavigation: pass: Sift digital-twins dot activates slide 3 and cleanly deactivates slides 1 and 2
checks.visualEvidence: pass: Sift telemetry and Anduril Fury render as single clean frames without overlapping bands or ghost layers

truthBoundary.verified: local immutable v045 candidate in Chromium
